verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I woke up this morning and rose with the sun, Thinking of Jesus and all that He's done; He's never failed one time to meet every need, Cause Jesus keeps pouring out His blessings on me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He keeps blessing me more, And I can see He's guiding me more than ever before. I may not have riches, but I'll never be poor, Cause He keeps blessing me more.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The storm clouds may gather and darken the sky, But the sun still keeps shining though it's hid from my eyes; And behind every trial His blessing I see. Cause Jesus keeps shining His light down on me.
